category_sources: Official xtitle page describes a shell script for xterm or xterm-like windows.
source_facts.description: Set window title and icon for your X terminal.
display_name_sources: Official project page and man page use xtitle.
docs_sources: Official xtitle page links the included manual page; the manual documents name, synopsis, description, options, caveats, and version.
source_facts.homepage is the official xtitle page.
repo_sources: Official xtitle page provides homepage, tarball download, and manual page but no official source-control repository URL was found.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was checked.
tags_sources: Official man page says xtitle outputs xterm control sequences to set title and icon name.
source_facts.description identifies X terminal title/icon control.
